description: Create a Webform in Vtiger CRM named 'B2B Landing Page' for the 'Leads' module. Set the Return URL to 'https://www.store-example.com/thank-you' and assign it to 'Admin User'. The form must include the following fields: Last Name (Required), Company (Required), Primary Email, Phone, and Lead Source. Configure the 'Lead Source' field as 'Hidden' with an 'Override Value' of 'Web Site'.
